Read .impeccable.md and AGENTS.md before making UI/UX changes.



Apply Impeccable design principles to this project.



Project: VJSS Connect — Viet Nam Japan Semiconductor Symposium website.



Design goal:

Create a premium international academic conference website with clean layout, strong typography, professional spacing, clear CTA hierarchy, responsive design, and polished UI.



Focus pages:

Home, About, Program, Speakers, Venue, Organizers, Sponsors, News, Contact, Submission, Registration.



Rules:

\- Improve UI/UX carefully, page by page.

\- Avoid generic AI-looking UI.

\- Use wide, spacious layouts.

\- Ensure all visible text uses i18n.

\- Remove duplicated, placeholder, or inconsistent content.

\- Improve footer, organizer logos, sponsor logos, submission, and registration pages.

\- Keep code clean, production-ready, and responsive.
